title: Process Engineer Vacancy at CEAT Tyres Capital India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at CEAT Tyres Capital India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
CEAT Tyres Capital India has an exciting opening for a Process Engineer at our Pune office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About CEAT Tyres Capital India:
CEAT Tyres Capital India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in GD&T

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Learning & development budget
• Recognition and rewards programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CEAT Tyres Capital India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
